title: Walking Canes
description: Walking Canes to occupy your offhand
body:
This mod was born out of the boredom of holding your shield in the offhand 90% of the time. Introducing walking canes! 
![A showcase of the models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aec2e0576169c21dd1806445ff0f04c0ba0ade05.png)

All of the canes give you a 15% speedboost when held in your offhand. Some of them also have other neat passive effects.

They also have 3D models to make you look even more dapper.



Walking Cane - made with a gold ingot, sticks and a polarbear tooth, gives a speedboost.

Bamboo Cane - made with two bamboo and a string, gives a speedboost.

Cane of the Sea - made with copper ingots, prismarine shards and a heart of the sea, gives a speedboost and depthstrider effect.

Cane of Undying - made with ravager horns and a totem of undying, give a speedboost and works otherwise exactly like the totem while in your offhand.

Shulker Cane - made with a clump of phantom membranes and a couple of shulker shells and end rods, gives you a speedboost and improves elytra flying by negating wall crash damage and increasing hover time.
